description: David Nakamura, a 52-year-old male (DOB 03/15/1974, Blood Type A+, Phone 617-555-0342, Address '2847 Elm Street, Boston, MA 02108'), presents to the Emergency Department with substernal chest pain radiating to his left arm. Perform his complete ED admission: register him as a new patient, create an admission visit (Location: Emergency Department, Examiner: Dr. Sarah Mitchell), and complete his clinical workup. Record triage vitals: BP 168/98, HR 104, RR 22, Temp 37.2 C, O2 Sat 95%, Weight 91kg, Height 175cm. Add diagnosis 'Acute Coronary Syndrome'. Order a Troponin I lab test and a Chest X-ray (notes: 'PA and lateral views. Rule out acute coronary syndrome and pulmonary pathology'). Prescribe Aspirin 325mg, quantity 1, chew immediately. Schedule a Cardiology follow-up appointment between 04/01/2026 and 04/14/2026 with reason 'Post-ED cardiac risk stratification'. Login: hradmin / test at http://localhost:3000.
